story_info.title: Barnaby's Missing Cloud Pillow
story_info.subtitle: A Cozy Bedtime Tale
story_info.theme: A sleepy bunny searching for his favourite pillow
story_info.moral: Comfort and a good night's sleep help us feel happy and safe.

main_character.name: Barnaby
main_character.appearance: A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside. He wears soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas.
main_character.personality: Sweet, gentle, a little bit clumsy, very sleepy, and loves comfort.

cover.prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, happily snuggled with a fluffy white cloud-shaped pillow, sitting on a pile of soft blankets in a cozy, moonlit bedroom. Reserve the lower third for title placement. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.

slides.title: Ready for Sleep
slides.text: The moon began to glow, and little Barnaby the bunny felt a big yawn stretch across his face. He wiggled his nose, tucked in his fluffy tail, and hopped towards his soft, cozy bed. 'Time for sleepy-sleep,' he mumbled, already dreaming of warm, happy things.
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, stretching a big yawn near a window with a gentle moon glowing outside, looking sleepy but content in a cozy, pastel bedroom. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce Barnaby and his readiness for bedtime.

slides.title: Pillow Search Begins
slides.text: But wait! Something important was missing. Barnaby looked under his striped quilt and behind his favorite starry night blanket. Where could his super-soft, cloud-like pillow be? He loved snuggling it close every single night for sweet dreams.
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, peering under a colorful striped quilt on his bed, looking a little puzzled and sleepy, in a softly lit, gentle bedroom. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: Highlight Barnaby's discovery of his missing pillow.

slides.title: The Blanket Fort Clue
slides.text: First, Barnaby tiptoed to his blanket fort, built from the fluffiest throws. He peeked inside, hoping to find his pillow hiding there, perhaps planning a game of 'hide-and-seek.' But only his tiny flashlight and a forgotten carrot stick were nestled within.
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, gently peeking into a cozy blanket fort made of pastel throws, looking hopeful. A tiny flashlight is visible inside. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: Barnaby explores a common hiding spot for children's items.

slides.title: Toy Box Investigation
slides.text: Next, he padded over to his wooden toy chest, full of colourful blocks and gentle rattles. Maybe his pillow had decided to play with his softest, cuddly friends? He carefully rummaged, his little paws pushing aside the friendly toys, but no pillow appeared.
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, gently looking into an open wooden toy chest filled with soft, pastel-colored toys, his paws carefully sifting through them. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: Barnaby checks another likely place where toys might be.

slides.title: Found at Last!
slides.text: Just as Barnaby began to feel a little droopy, he spotted a tiny corner of white peeking out from behind his favorite brown teddy bear, Barnaby Bear. 'Aha!' he whispered happily. There it was, his beloved cloud pillow, safe and sound!
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, spotting a corner of his white cloud-shaped pillow peeking out from behind a friendly, soft brown teddy bear on a comfy armchair. Barnaby looks relieved and happy. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: Barnaby finally finds his pillow and feels relieved.

slides.title: Sweet Dreams Begin
slides.text: With his precious pillow tucked under his chin, Barnaby snuggled deep into his bed. He closed his sleepy sky-blue eyes, feeling soft and warm all over. Now, gentle dreams of hopping through fields of moonlight could begin. Sleep tight, little one.
slides.image_prompt: Pixar-quality 3D, Soft lighting, Pastel colours, Children's book illustration, Vertical composition, Instagram friendly. A small, plump, fluffy white bunny with big, expressive sky-blue eyes and long, floppy ears that are light pink on the inside, wearing soft, striped baby blue and white pajamas, deeply asleep in his bed, snuggled with his fluffy white cloud-shaped pillow. Soft moonlight streams gently through a nearby window. Do NOT include text inside the artwork.
slides.speaker_notes: A peaceful ending encouraging the child to fall asleep.

instagram.caption: 🌙 Snuggle up, little ones! Join Barnaby the bunny on a gentle quest to find his favorite cloud pillow before bedtime. A sweet, calming tale perfect for winding down and drifting off to dreamland. ✨ Link in bio to read the full story!

email.subject: 🐰 Sweet Dreams Await with Barnaby's Missing Cloud Pillow!
email.preview: Discover our new gentle bedtime story for your little ones. Perfect for a calming end to the day!

youtube.title: Barnaby's Missing Cloud Pillow | A Gentle Bedtime Story for Kids (3-6 Years Old)
youtube.description: Join Barnaby the adorable bunny on a soft, sleepy adventure as he searches for his beloved cloud pillow before bedtime. This calming story, perfect for children aged 3-6, features gentle pacing, a positive message, and beautiful Pixar-quality 3D illustrations. Help your little one unwind and drift off to sweet dreams! Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more magical bedtime tales.
